granola.comment: SENTINEL — Meeting transcripts, summaries, action items. Reads from local Granola app. Requires Granola installed at ~/Library/Application Support/Granola/. Docs: https://github.com/EoinFalconer/granola-mcp-server

google-calendar.comment: SENTINEL — Read upcoming meetings, trigger pre-meeting briefs. Tokens at ~/.config/google-calendar-mcp/tokens.json. Docs: https://github.com/nspady/google-calendar-mcp

gmail.comment: QUILL — Read inbox, search threads, surface replies for drafting. Tokens at ~/.gmail-mcp/credentials.json. Docs: https://github.com/GongRzhe/Gmail-MCP-Server

notion.comment: NEXUS — Read/write Notion pages and databases. Client notes, project docs, internal content. Setup: https://www.notion.so/profile/integrations → create integration → copy token. Docs: https://github.com/makenotion/notion-mcp-server

github.comment: NEXUS — Manage this repo, create issues for blocked tasks, track client projects. Setup: https://github.com/settings/tokens → repo scope. Docs: https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/servers/tree/main/src/github

firecrawl.comment: INTEL / SCOUT — Convert any URL to clean markdown. Company sites, press pages, pricing. $16/mo. Get key: https://firecrawl.dev/app/api-keys. Docs: https://docs.firecrawl.dev/mcp-server

apify.comment: INTEL / SCOUT — 6,000+ scrapers: LinkedIn profiles, Google Search, news, job boards, Google Maps. Get token: https://console.apify.com → Settings → Integrations. Docs: https://docs.apify.com/platform/integrations/mcp

syncgtm.comment: SCOUT — Waterfall enrichment across 50+ data providers. 87% email match rate. Replaces Apollo. Signup: https://app.syncgtm.com/signup → Settings → API key. Remote HTTP server.

gdrive.comment: NEXUS — Drive, Docs, Sheets, Slides. BPN client folder, BD pipeline sheet, proposals. Tokens at ~/.config/google-drive-mcp/tokens.json
